case_title: STEWART, MACK M. JR. VS CARL AND DAN'S CHEVERON INC.

docket_entries.description: INVALID SERVICE AS TO CARL & DAN'S CHEVRON, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,880.00 FILED BY STEWART, MACK M. JR. AS TO DEFENDANT CARL AND DAN'S CHEVERON INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART, MACK M. JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARL AND DAN'S CHEVERON INC. $2,279.50 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,294.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
